curation_notes: Re-curation with updated guidelines. Primary vulnerability in safe-runtime.ts createSafeError: only shadowed __proto__ with a data property but did not call Object.setPrototypeOf(error, null), leaving the real prototype chain traversable via Object.getPrototypeOf or __lookupGetter__. Secondary locations in vm-adapter.ts (createSafeConsole, createProtectedSandbox, createSafeObject) threw raw new Error() objects directly into the sandbox without any prototype chain protection. double-vm-wrapper.ts contained a duplicate createSafeError with the same incomplete isolation. parent-vm-bootstrap.ts had inline __ag_createSafeError functions within the generated bootstrap code with the same flaw. Patch extracts createSafeError into a shared safe-error.ts module with the critical Object.setPrototypeOf(error, null) call and replaces all raw Error throws. 63 files changed total but most are docs, assets, and tests; 12 non-test source files changed making this a noisy patch. Vulnerability class command-injection retained from pre-assignment (CWE-94 Code Injection; enables arbitrary code execution via prototype chain traversal to host Function constructor).
